universe.base.title: The First Road
universe.base.description: A small starter universe for testing JSON content, travel, actions, and contribution flow.
location.crossroads.title: Wayside Crossroads
location.crossroads.description: A lantern-lit meeting place where rumors arrive before travelers do.
location.emberwood.title: Emberwood
location.emberwood.description: A warm forest of red-barked trees and low-burning leaves.
location.old-quarry.title: Old Quarry
location.old-quarry.description: Weather-cut stone terraces hum faintly after sunset.
action.gather-rumors.title: Gather Rumors
action.gather-rumors.description: Listen for useful fragments of old stories and current trouble.
action.gather-rumors.success: A useful rumor settles into memory.
action.gather-rumors.failure: The rumor trail goes cold before anything useful turns up.
action.speak-to-tutorial-guide.title: Speak to Tutorial Guide
action.speak-to-tutorial-guide.descripti: Ask the guide for a little practical advice.
action.speak-to-tutorial-guide.success: The Tutorial Guide is ready to talk.
action.fight-goblin.title: Fight Goblin
action.fight-goblin.description: Trade quick blows with a small roadside raider.
action.fight-goblin.failure: The goblin slips away from your strike.
action.chop-oak-tree.title: Chop Oak Tree
action.chop-oak-tree.description: Work through the oak's stubborn trunk.
action.chop-oak-tree.success: Your axe bites into the oak.
action.chop-oak-tree.failure: The axe glances off the oak grain.
action.fight-ent.title: Fight Ent
action.fight-ent.description: Use woodcutting skill against a walking tree that hits back.
action.fight-ent.success: You cut into the ent's bark.
action.fight-ent.failure: The ent twists away from the chop.
action.fight-ork.title: Fight Ork
action.fight-ork.description: Test yourself against a tougher brawler.
action.fight-ork.success: You land a solid hit on the ork.
action.fight-ork.failure: The ork shrugs past your attack.
action.fight-troll.title: Fight Troll
action.fight-troll.description: Challenge a brute with heavy hands and thicker hide.
action.fight-troll.success: You carve through part of the troll's guard.
action.fight-troll.failure: The troll absorbs the attempt without giving ground.
interaction.melee-combat.title: Melee Combat
interaction.woodcutting.title: Woodcutting
interaction.woodcutting.player.miss: You fail to bite into the {target}.
interaction.woodcutting-combat.title: Woodcutting Combat
interaction.woodcutting-combat.player.mi: The {target}'s bark turns your chop aside.
action.forage-embers.title: Forage Emberleaf
action.forage-embers.description: Gather emberleaf without waking the ash mites.
action.forage-embers.success: You gather emberleaf and keep the ash mites sleeping.
action.forage-embers.failure: The emberleaf crumbles to ash before you can collect it.
action.survey-stonework.title: Survey Stonework
action.survey-stonework.description: Study old tool marks and salvageable masonry.
action.survey-stonework.success: The old stonework gives up a few practical secrets.
action.survey-stonework.failure: Dust and shadows hide the stonework's useful details.
action.mine-iron-ore-vein.title: Mine Iron Ore Vein
action.mine-iron-ore-vein.description: Work an exposed ore vein with any pickaxe you own.
action.mine-iron-ore-vein.success: You chip iron ore free from the vein.
action.mine-iron-ore-vein.failure: The ore vein resists your attempt.
skill.lore.title: Lore
skill.lore.description: Memory, myth, and the patience to connect old clues.
skill.survival.title: Survival
skill.survival.description: Practical knowledge for harsh country and stranger weather.
skill.craft.title: Craft
skill.craft.description: Making, repairing, and improving useful things.
skill.woodcutting.title: Woodcutting
skill.woodcutting.description: Reading grain, landing chops, and bringing down stubborn timber.
skill.mining.title: Mining
skill.mining.description: Reading stone, striking ore, and extracting useful minerals.
skill.health.title: Health
skill.attack.title: Attack
skill.attack.description: Accuracy, timing, and pressure in direct conflict.
skill.defense.title: Defense
skill.defense.description: Guard, positioning, and staying intact under pressure.
skill.regeneration.title: Regeneration
skill.regeneration.description: Recovered health per minute while time passes.
skill.troll-blood.title: Troll's Blood
skill.troll-blood.description: A second healing-over-time source for validating separate experience gain.

resource.health.title: Health
effect.health-regeneration.title: Health regeneration
effect.health-troll-blood.title: Troll's Blood healing
item.emberleaf.title: Emberleaf
item.emberleaf.description: A warm leaf that keeps a coal-like glow after it falls.
item.log.title: Log
item.tutorial-blade.title: Heirloom Arming Sword
item.tutorial-blade.description: A worn but cared-for sword from the Tutorial Guide.
item.bronze-pickaxe.title: Bronze Pickaxe
item.bronze-pickaxe.description: A simple pickaxe suitable for ore veins.
item.iron-ore.title: Iron Ore
item.iron-ore.description: A rough chunk of iron-bearing stone.
item.bones.title: Bones
item.bones.description: Dry bones from a defeated creature.
item.bronze-spear.title: Bronze Spear
item.bronze-dagger.title: Bronze Dagger
item.bronze-dagger.description: A short bronze blade suited to quick strikes.
item.bronze-arrow.title: Bronze Arrow
item.bronze-arrow.description: An arrow with a small bronze head.
item.bronze-throwing-knife.title: Bronze Throwing Knife
item.bronze-throwing-knife.description: A balanced bronze knife meant to be thrown.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.start: Greetings adventurer, I see you are new in town. I am at your disposal!
dialogue.tutorial-guide.option.combatExp: What is the best way for me to get combat experience?
dialogue.tutorial-guide.option.woodcutti: Do you know any secrets about woodcutting?
dialogue.tutorial-guide.option.gullyRock: What can I do with those rocks in the gully?
dialogue.tutorial-guide.option.takeLogs: Can you take some of these logs off of me?
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.first: You're a fighter then! It's simple. You want to get better at fighting? Then... fight! Those goblins down the road are a good enough place to start.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.secondA: Again? Well, just fight things. The better you are at it the faster you improve.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.secondB: It's only common sense, how can you expect to be good at regeneration if you've never healed a health point in your life! Ha ha ha!
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.forgetfulA: Did you already forget? My! I heard fighters were meatheads, but this is pushing it!
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.forgetfulB: Just fight some monsters and you'll be fine.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.finalA: Just... just, take this. And leave me alone!!
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q1.finalReward: You receive an heirloom arming sword from the Tutorial Guide.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q2: Sure! I know all the secrets.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q2.option.notTel: You're not going to tell me are you.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q2.o1.a: Ha! Youngsters these days. Look kid. Just chop that tree over there, and don't do it with a sword. Get yourself a proper woodcutting axe.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q2.o1.b: And be careful. Some trees can and will be rather upset at you for the attempt.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q3.a: Those over there are called ore veins. You can mine them. Any sort of pickaxe will do and they give you some nice rich goodies for the trouble.
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q3.b: Here, take this pickaxe and give it a try. Off you go!
dialogue.tutorial-guide.q4: Little old me's not gonna say no to free stuff.
